mapper.sql: id,request_id AS requestId,tenant_id AS tenantId,user_id AS userId,api_key_id AS apiKeyId, currency_code AS currencyCode,actual_amount AS actualAmount,outstanding_amount AS outstandingAmount, status,reason_code AS reasonCode,tenant_model_id AS tenantModelId,tenant_model_code AS tenantModelCode, inbound_protocol AS inboundProtocol,endpoint,price_version AS priceVersion, input_price_per_million AS inputPricePerMillion,output_price_per_million AS outputPricePerMillion, cache_write_price_per_million AS cacheWritePricePerMillion, cache_read_price_per_million AS cacheReadPricePerMillion, upstream_dispatch_state AS upstreamDispatchState,finalized_at AS finalizedAt, reconciled_at AS reconciledAt,reconciled_by AS reconciledBy,reconciliation_note AS reconciliationNote, created_at AS createdAt,updated_at AS updatedAt
mapper.select: SELECT FROM billing_settlement WHERE request_id=#{requestId} FOR UPDATE

INSERT INTO billing_settlement(request_id,tenant_id,user_id,api_key_id,currency_code,actual_amount, outstanding_amount,status,reason_code,tenant_model_id,tenant_model_code,inbound_protocol,endpoint, price_version,input_price_per_million,output_price_per_million,cache_write_price_per_million, cache_read_price_per_million,upstream_dispatch_state,finalized_at) VALUES(#{event.requestId},#{event.tenantId},#{event.userId},#{event.apiKeyId},#{event.currencyCode}, #{actualAmount},#{outstandingAmount},#{status},#{reasonCode},#{event.tenantModelId},#{event.tenantModelCode}, #{event.inboundProtocol},#{event.endpoint},#{event.priceVersion},#{event.inputPricePerMillion}, #{event.outputPricePerMillion},#{event.cacheWritePricePerMillion},#{event.cacheReadPricePerMillion}, #{dispatchState},CASE WHEN #{status} IN ('SETTLED','NO_CHARGE') THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END) ON CONFLICT(request_id) DO NOTHING RETURNING id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO credit_transaction(tenant_id,user_id,direction,delta,balance_before,balance_after, reason,source,transaction_type,billing_settlement_id,operator_id,operator_name,created_at) VALUES(#{tenantId},#{userId},#{direction},#{delta},#{balanceBefore},#{balanceAfter}, #{reason},'BILLING',#{transactionType},#{billingSettlementId},#{userId},'API 请求自动结算',NOW())

INSERT INTO billing_settlement(request_id,tenant_id,user_id,api_key_id,currency_code,actual_amount, outstanding_amount,status,reason_code,tenant_model_id,tenant_model_code,inbound_protocol,endpoint, price_version,input_price_per_million,output_price_per_million,cache_write_price_per_million, cache_read_price_per_million,upstream_dispatch_state) SELECT log.request_id,log.tenant_id,log.user_id,log.api_key_id,'CNY',NULL,0,'RECONCILIATION_PENDING', 'TERMINAL_EVENT_TIMEOUT',log.tenant_model_id,log.tenant_model_code,log.inbound_protocol,log.endpoint, 1,0,0,NULL,NULL,'UNKNOWN' FROM relay_request_log log WHERE log.request_status='STARTED' AND log.started_at < #{olderThan} ON CONFLICT(request_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM billing_settlement WHERE status='RECONCILIATION_PENDING' AND tenant_id=#{tenantId}
mapper.update: UPDATE billing_settlement SET status='SETTLED',actual_amount=#{actualAmount},outstanding_amount=0, reason_code='MANUAL_SETTLE',finalized_at=NOW(),reconciled_at=NOW(),reconciled_by=#{operatorId}, reconciliation_note=#{note},updated_at=NOW() WHERE request_id=#{requestId} AND status='RECONCILIATION_PENDING'

UPDATE billing_settlement SET status='NO_CHARGE',actual_amount=0,outstanding_amount=0, reason_code='MANUAL_NO_CHARGE',finalized_at=NOW(),reconciled_at=NOW(),reconciled_by=#{operatorId}, reconciliation_note=#{note},updated_at=NOW() WHERE request_id=#{requestId} AND status='RECONCILIATION_PENDING'
